giftsubcurrencyrewards.usage: Usage: !giftcurrencyreward list (currencyId) | toggle | message [message] | clearmsg | set [currencyId] [subsGifted] [currencyAmount] | remove [currencyId] [subsGifted] | clear [currencyId]
giftsubcurrencyrewards.missing.multicurr: The multi-currency system is not loaded.
giftsubcurrencyrewards.list.none: No gift-sub custom-currency rewards have been configured.
giftsubcurrencyrewards.list.empty: No gift-sub custom-currency rewards are configured for '$1'.

giftsubcurrencyrewards.remove.missing: No gift-sub reward breakpoint exists for $1 at $2 gifted sub(s).
